recommendations.title: Mystic River
recommendations.overview: The lives of three men who were childhood friends are shattered when one of them suffers a family tragedy.

recommendations.title: Windfall
recommendations.overview: In an opulent vacation home, a mysterious intruder is forced to kidnap the property owners -- a wealthy CEO and his wife -- when they arrive unexpectedly.

recommendations.title: Karla
recommendations.overview: Based on real events, Canada's most notorious serial killers, Paul Bernardo and wife Karla Homolka kidnap, sexually abuse, and murder three young girls.

recommendations.title: Lady Snowblood
recommendations.overview: Yuki's family is nearly wiped out before she is born due to the machinations of a band of criminals. These criminals kidnap and brutalize her mother but leave her alive. Later her mother ends up in prison with only revenge to keep her alive. She crea

recommendations.title: Requiem for a Dream
recommendations.overview: The drug-induced utopias of four Coney Island residents are shattered when their addictions run deep.

recommendations.title: The Man Who Wasn't There
recommendations.overview: A tale of murder, crime and punishment set in the summer of 1949. Ed Crane, a barber in a small California town, is dissatisfied with his life, but his wife Doris' infidelity and a mysterious opportunity presents him with a chance to change it.

recommendations.title: Blackmail
recommendations.overview: When Dev finds about his wife's affair, he starts blackmailing her and her lover but the blackmail game backfires on him.

recommendations.title: Suzhou River
recommendations.overview: After getting out of prison, small-time crook Mardar stumbles upon a woman who looks exactly like his long-lost lover, who he attempted to kidnap 3 years ago.

recommendations.title: Flying Home
recommendations.overview: Colin, an ambitious young American businessman, has a deal with a potential client, a rich Arab sheikh who is a passionate pigeon fancier. The sheikh has tried several times to buy a champion pigeon, but the owner continues to stubbornly refuse his o

recommendations.title: The Unfaithful Wife
recommendations.overview: Insurance executive Charles suspects his wife Hélène of playing the field, so he has a private detective locate his wife's lover, author Victor Pegala.
